title: Create: Chemistry
description: A mod with somewhat real-life accurate chemistry with recipes for the create mod. Adds things like acids, ethanol, some chemicals extracted from natural blocks, and some more.
body:
Chemistry recipes for the Create mod

This mod is still in its _early stages of development_, bugs and glitches are expected.

# Items
- Empty capsule
- Ethanol capsule
- Sulfur
- Sulfur Dust
- Sulfate (sulfur oxide)
- Copper sulfate
- Calcium dust
- Calcium Sulfate
- Calcium nitrate
- Loose soil
- Bottles for all the virtual fluids
# Virtual fluids
- Sulfuric acid
- Nitric acid
- Ethanol
- Yeasted water
- Beer
# Blocks
- Sulfur ore
- Deepslate sulfur ore
